title: Residents walk for International Day of Persons with Disabilities
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Mossel Bay residents came together for the second Ethan Iconic Walk around The Point to celebrate International Day of Persons with Disabilities.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay residents came together for the second Ethan Iconic Walk around The Point to celebrate International Day of Persons with Disabilities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Those who attended the fun walk, hosted yesterday, Wednesday 3 December, made their way around The Point three times, starting at 18:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ethan, or rather the Education and Training Hub for Autism Needs, is a non-profit company with the mission of educating and empowering parents, caregivers and individuals with autism, and to create an inclusive community that embraces diversity.","html":"Ethan, or rather the Education and Training Hub for Autism Needs, is a non-profit company with the mission of educating and empowering parents, caregivers and individuals with autism, and to create an inclusive community that embraces diversity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The walk was hosted in partnership with the Mossel Bay Municipality, Mossel Bay Tourism, and the departments of health and social development.","html":"The walk was hosted in partnership with the Mossel Bay Municipality, Mossel Bay Tourism, and the departments of health and social development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Thank you to each and every one involved in the planning and co-ordination of the Iconic Walk. It was truly a celebration of different abilities and a fun event with the purpose of showing that there is strength in diversity,” the Ethan Project said.","html":"“Thank you to each and every one involved in the planning and co-ordination of the Iconic Walk. It was truly a celebration of different abilities and a fun event with the purpose of showing that there is strength in diversity,” the Ethan Project said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
